## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check`

## Notes

Add migration notes, config changes, or operational impact.
